description:
Semiconductors are essential to all IT products, and its performance often determines the performance of the final products. SK hynix is a global leader in producing semiconductor, such as DRAM, NAND Flash. With these technology driven semiconductor products, SK hynix consistently led the industry and is now the second largest memory chip maker. 

IT devices become more pervasive as new imaginative and innovative IT products continue to grab imagination and desires of consumers. SK hynix has enhanced its competency with the best level of technology and a wide range of business portfolios in order to satisfy all those demand from customers. As a member of SK Group*, SK hynix is aiming at becoming the world’s best semiconductor company. 



*SK Group is one of South Korea's top three industrial conglomerates.
It has about 198 affiliated companies, ranging from energy, telecommunications, finance, and construction.
description_enriched: SK hynix is a technology innovator that aims to create a better world through their products and services.

company_updates.description:
At #DTW2026 in Las Vegas, SK hynix showcased how its AI memory portfolio is helping scale the future of AI infrastructure. From #HBM4 and Server #DRAM to enterprise and client #SSD solutions, the booth highlighted the company’s role as a full-stack AI memory creator powering next-generation AI data centers and AI PCs. 
 
Together with Dell Technologies, SK hynix also demonstrated how strategic partnerships are accelerating innovation across the #AI ecosystem — from high-performance computing to scalable storage solutions.
 
📌Learn more on our newsroom: https://lnkd.in/gxDmz9Wq
 
#SKhynix #DellTechnologies #DTW #HBM #AI

SK hynix has been honored with the Gold Tower Order of Industrial Service Merit and a Presidential Citation at the 61st Invention Day ceremony, recognizing its leadership in AI memory innovation.
 
CDO Ahn Hyun was recognized for leading next generation technologies including #HBM4 and 321 layer 4D #NAND, while Technical Leader Hyungjin Choi received the Presidential Citation for contributions to advanced NAND technologies, reinforcing SK hynix’s continued leadership in the global AI memory market. 
 
🔗 Learn more: https://lnkd.in/gDuQZuv8
 
#SKhynix #AI #HBM #Semiconductor #InventionDay

"A genius with amnesia."
This is how 권순용(SOD), the founder of Heisenberg and a renowned tech creator, describes the current state of #AI—where even the most powerful processors cannot reach their full potential without a timely supply of data. This illustrates the 'Memory Wall,' the most critical bottleneck facing the AI industry today.
 
SK 하이닉스 is breaking through these limits. With next-generation memory solutions including #HBM, #CXL, and #PIM, we are resolving data bottlenecks and unlocking the true capabilities of the global #AI ecosystem.
 
👀 If you are curious about SOD's review, read the full article at this link: https://lnkd.in/g5MRERyN
 
#SKhynix #AIMemory #MemoryWall #Innovation

Recognized for our contribution to advancing the #AI computing ecosystem, SK 하이닉스 has received the 2026 IEEE Corporate Innovation Award.
 
This milestone honors our proven leadership in the stable mass production of all #HBM generations.
 
Through robust partnerships with global big tech, we will continue to lead the future of AI innovation.
 
🔗 Read the full press release: https://lnkd.in/gxMKd3-B
 
#SKhynix #IEEE #HBM

Why did SK 하이닉스 adopt Advanced MR-MUF for #HBM?🤔 It is the definitive packaging breakthrough required to overcome physical limits, securing maximized heat dissipation and structural stability.
 
By filling microscopic gaps with a liquid material that hardens into a continuous thermal conductor, SK 하이닉스 bonds ultra-thin chips at significantly lower pressures to prevent warpage. This world-first innovation enabled the flawless mass production of 12-layer HBM3 and improved productivity by three times.
 
Swipe through to see how Advanced MR-MUF redefines what’s possible in High Bandwidth Memory.
 
#SKhynix #AdvancedMRMUF #HighBandwidthMemory #HBM #AIMemory #Semiconductor

True #AI innovation begins at the architecture level, where memory and logic unite. At the #TSMC Technology Symposium 2026, SK 하이닉스 presented a new structural direction to resolve the memory wall. As a co-creator, we collaborate directly with customers from the initial design stage to deliver customized memory solutions.
 
Under the theme of 'Invisible Technology', we showcased our next-generation portfolio, including the 16-layer #HBM4 and 192GB #SOCAMM2. By maintaining a 'One Team' #Partnership with TSMC and our customers, we are building a more efficient and highly integrated #Memory ecosystem.
 
🔗 Read the full press release: https://lnkd.in/gtVMPc-3
 
#SKhynix #AIMemory

SK 하이닉스 achieved record-high financial results in the first quarter of 2026, driven by our leadership in the #AImemory market.
 
Recording 52.58 trillion KRW in revenue and 37.61 trillion KRW in operating profit, we are solidifying our position as a Full-Stack AI Memory Creator. This growth is fueled by strong demand for high value-added products, including #HBM and high-capacity #eSSD.
 
Supported by 35 trillion KRW in net cash, we will maintain robust financial soundness while proactively investing to ensure a stable supply for the expanding global #DataCenter infrastructure.
 
🔗 Read the full 1Q26 earnings release: https://lnkd.in/gCKnx6HM
 
#SKhynix #FinancialResult

10 minutes to protect the #Earth. In observance of Earth Day, SK 하이닉스 is participating in a company-wide lights-off campaign across key locations, including the Management Support Building at Cheongju Campus 3, Bundang Doosan Tower, and Bundang SK U-Tower.

By turning off the lights at 8:00 PM on April 22, our employees are taking practical steps to reduce energy consumption, turning our commitment to sustainability into collective action.
